Available Q3 2026

Sankt Peders Stræde 28, 1453 Copenhagen K — Denmark

(01) — What we do

Services — how
we work.

Four practices, one studio. We rarely take on a project that uses only one of them — most of our best work lives in the seams between them.

01

From €18,000

Art Direction

We set the visual register for a brand, campaign, or product — and stay close enough to defend it through production.

Deliverables

  • + Visual research deck
  • + Direction document
  • + Production oversight
  • + Talent + photo direction

Ideal for

Founders launching a new venture; brands repositioning after a Series A; editors planning an issue.

Example — Hjem Magazine — Issue 04 ↗
02

From €34,000

Brand Identity

Systems that hold up across every surface: print, screen, motion. A wordmark is the easy part — the grid is the work.

Deliverables

  • + Logotype + marque
  • + Type + colour system
  • + Brand guidelines (Notion + PDF)
  • + Templates + production files

Ideal for

Studios, foundries, roasteries, and product companies that want to grow without losing their grain.

Example — Kjeld & Co. — full identity ↗
03

From €12,000

Motion Direction

Short-form motion for launch films, social, and interface. Hand-eased, never templated.

Deliverables

  • + Storyboard + animatic
  • + 15s / 30s / 60s edits
  • + Lottie / GIF / MP4 deliverables
  • + Sound design partner

Ideal for

Launches, campaigns, and product moments that deserve more than a Premiere preset.

Example — Meridian Type — release film ↗
04

From €24,000

Editorial websites

Hand-built websites with editorial typography, considered transitions, and a CMS the team will actually use.

Deliverables

  • + Sitemap + wireframes
  • + Design system
  • + Custom build
  • + CMS setup + handoff

Ideal for

Studios, journals, B2B SaaS, and founders who care that the site reads as well as it scrolls.

Example — Feltland.com — full build ↗
(02) — Process

Five stages, one rhythm.

STAGE I

Discovery

A week of listening, sketching, and asking better questions than the brief did.

STAGE II

Direction

Two or three visual territories — defended in prose, not in mood boards.

STAGE III

Design

We design the whole system from one decision outward. No deck of "options to pick from."

STAGE IV

Build

Hand-coded, accessible by default. The CMS is part of the design.

STAGE V

Launch

A quiet handoff, with a Loom, a Notion, and a six-month aftercare window.

(03) — Engagement

Three ways in.

All prices ex. VAT · DKK / EUR / USD

2 weeks

Sprint

€6,000

One designer, one week of direction, one week of execution. Best for a focused deliverable.

  • ● One scope (e.g. landing page)
  • ● Daily working sessions
  • ● Source + built files at handoff
  • ● No revisions after week 2
Enquire →
Recommended

8–14 weeks

Project

€34,000+

The full studio, end-to-end. Our standard engagement and where most of our work lives.

  • ● Full strategy + design + build
  • ● Three feedback rounds
  • ● Brand guidelines included
  • ● Six-month aftercare
Start a project →

Quarterly

Partnership

€18,000 /mo

A retained relationship for studios with an ongoing design cadence. Two slots per year.

  • ● Dedicated team time, four days / wk
  • ● Quarterly direction reviews
  • ● Priority on new work
  • ● Studio Slack channel
Enquire →
(04) — Questions, answered

A first call (free, 30 min) to understand the brief. We follow up with a one-page proposal — scope, timeline, fee — within 48 hours. If it fits, we send a contract and a deposit invoice. No agency dance.

Yes — most of our work is remote, with two or three on-site weeks per year for kick-offs and shoots. We work in CET but overlap comfortably with EST and PST.

The tiers are a guide, not a menu. Tell us what you're working on and we'll write a custom proposal. We turn down more projects than we take — clarity is kinder for both sides.

Occasionally, for founders we already know and for projects we already believe in. Not as a general policy.

Rarely. Logos are downstream of a brand, and brands are downstream of a business. We can usually help most by widening the scope, not narrowing it.

Currently booking Q3 2026 — two slots remaining as of this week. Q4 is open and Q1 2027 has early-bird placeholder time for repeat clients.

Studio Nord

A small studio building brands and digital experiences with discipline and quiet ambition.

Sankt Peders Stræde 28, 1453 Copenhagen K — Denmark
